# contact_center.task_created

The **Task created** event is triggered when a task is created.

## Prerequisites

Enable **Event Subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:
* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
* The **Task created** subscription enabled under the **Contact Center** event.





**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center_task:read:admin`,`contact_center_task:write:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center:read:task:admin`

**Event type**: `contact_center.task_created`

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

object.description: Information about the created task.

task_status.description:
The task's status. 
* pending 
* reserved 
* assigned 
* canceled 
* completed 
* wrapping

channel_name.description:
The task's channel type. 
* voice 
* sms 
* chat 
* video  
* in_app_chat

task_priority.description: The task's priority, from 0 to 10. The greater the value, the higher the priority. The maximum value is 10.

created_time.description: The date and time when the task was created, to the second.

created_time_ms.description: The date and time when the task was created, to the millisecond.

last_modified_time.description: The date and time when the task was last modified, to the second.

last_modified_time_ms.description: The date and time when the task was last modified, to the millisecond.

auto_assign.description: Whether the task gets manually assigned to a target.

task_timeout.description: The task queue's timeout, to the second.

# contact_center.queue_created

The **Queue created** event is triggered when a task queue is created.

## Prerequisites

Enable **Event Subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:

  * A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
  * The **Queue created** subscription enabled under the **Contact Center** event.





**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center_queue:read:admin`,`contact_center_queue:write:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center:read:queue:admin`

**Event type**: `contact_center.queue_created`

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

object.description: Information about the created task queue.

max_wait_time.description: Maximum wait time, to the second.

wrap_up_time.description: The task queue's wrap up time, to the second.

max_engagement_in_queue.description: The task queue's maximum engagement in queue. Value must be between 1 and 3000.

short_abandon_enable.description: Whether to enable the **Short Abandon** setting is enabled.

short_abandon_threshold.description: The task queue's short abandon threshold, to the second.

connecting_media_id.description: Notify duration for each queue user, to the second.

connecting_media_name.description:
File name of the media in use while consumers are being connected.
Channel type - Voice

transferring_media_id.description:
Media ID to use while users are being transferred.
Channel type - Voice

transferring_media_name.description:

# contact_center.inbox_message_opened
The **Inbox message opened** event is triggered when an agent or supervisor plays the voicemail recording or views the transcript.

## Prerequisites

Enable **Event Subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:

* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
* The **Inbox message opened** subscription enabled under the **Contact Center** event.





**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center_inbox:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center:read:inbox:admin`

**Event type**: `contact_center.inbox_message_opened`

concurrent_email_capacity.description: The maximum number of concurrent email conversations that can be assigned to a user.

messaging_occupied.description: Mark the user's status as “Occupied” if they lack capacity for an additional active messaging engagement.

email_occupied.description: Mark the user's status as “Occupied” if they lack capacity for an additional active email engagement.

emergency_calling.description: Allow users to contact emergency services through their device's native phone system or Zoom Phone.

external_url.description: Launch a URL for incoming calls.

enable.description: If set to true, Enable Launch will be activated.

concurrent_message_capacity.description: The maximum number of concurrent messaging conversations that can be assigned to a user.

concurrent_email_capacity.description: The maximum number of concurrent email conversations that can be assigned to a user.

messaging_occupied.description: Mark the user's status as “Occupied” if they lack capacity for an additional active messaging engagement.

email_occupied.description: Mark the user's status as “Occupied” if they lack capacity for an additional active email engagement.

emergency_calling.description: Allow users to contact emergency services through their device's native phone system or Zoom Phone.

external_url.description: Launch a URL for incoming calls.

enable.description: If set to true, Enable Launch will be activated.

user_add_ons_plans.description: The user's Contact Center add-ons plan.

updates.description: Information about the updated closure set.

account_default.description: Default closure for the newly created queue.

closure_hour_type.description:
The closure's time type. 
* 1 - All day. 
* 2 - Customized time.

recurring_frequency.description:
The frequency of a closure's recurrence. 
* 0 - Never. 
* 1 - Annually. 
* 2 - Monthly. 
* 3 - Weekly.

recurring_frequency_type.description:
The closure time's type of recurrence. Applies to Annually, Monthly, and Weekly repeat frequency. Returns only for the not Never recurrence type. 
* 1 - Specific. 
* 2 - Customized.

recurring_month.description:
The recurrence month. Returns only for the Annually recurrence type. 
* 1 - January 
* 2 - February 
* 3 - March 
* 4 - April 
* 5 - May 
* 6 - June 
* 7 - July 
* 8 - August 
* 9 - September 
* 10 - October 
* 11 - November 
* 12 - December

recurring_week_interval.description: The number of weekly recurrences. Returns only for the Customized recurrence time types. When the type is Annually/Customized or Monthly/Customized, the minimum value is 1 and the maximum value is 5. When it is Weekly/Customized, the minimum value is 1 and the maximum value is 12.

recurring_days_of_week.description:
The week days of a recurrence. Returns only for the Weekly/Customized, the Weekly/Specific, the Annually/Customized, and the Monthly/Customized recurrence time types. When the type is Weekly/Customized, there may be multiple values. 
* 1 - Monday 
* 2 - Tuesday 
* 3 - Wednesday 
* 4 - Thursday 
* 5 - Friday 
* 6 - Saturday 
* 7 - Sunday

## Prerequisites

Enable **Event Subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:

The SMS sent status. 
* delivered 
* undelivered 
* failed

# contact_center.engagement_ended
The **Engagement ended** event is triggered when the engagement is ended.

An engagement is available via the [Get Engagement API](/docs/api/contact-center/#tag/engagements/get/contact_center/engagements/{engagementId}) once is completed processing, not immediately when is has ended. This API may return an empty response while the data is persisting.

You may need to retry this request for up to 1 minute to get engagement details, if querying shortly after an `engagement_ended webhook` event is received. Consider using a backoff between retries to avoid rate limiting.

# contact_center.engagement_user_answered

The **Engagement user answered** event is triggered when a user answers a voice or video engagement.

For **video** engagements, this event is triggered when:
* A user answers an inbound engagement.
* A user accepts an invite from another agent to join an engagement.
* A user answers a callback engagement.
* A user answers a scheduled callback engagement.
* A user answers an engagement after the engagement is transferred to a queue or flow.

## Prerequisites

Enable **Event Subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:

# contact_center.message_status
The **Message status** event is triggered when a message is sent by using the [**Send a Message**](/docs/api/contact-center/#tag/messaging/post/contact_center/messages) API. The receipt indicates whether the message was actually delivered to the consumer.

## Prerequisites

Enable **Event Subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:

* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
* The **Message status** subscription enabled under the **Contact Center** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center_messaging:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `contact_center:read:messaging:admin`

**Event type**: `contact_center.message_status`

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

object.description: Information about the message status.

message_id.description: The unique message identifier returned when the message was sent using the [**Send a Message**](/docs/api/contact-center/messages) API.

from.description: The sender's identifier. Different channels use platform-specific formats. For number-based channels, such as WhatsApp, the value must be in E.164 format.

to.description: The recipient's identifier. Different channels use platform-specific formats. For number-based channels, such as WhatsApp, the value must be in E.164 format.

reason.description: A short description of the failure reason when the status is failed.

error_detail.description: Additional detailed information about the failure when the status is failed.

date_time_ms.description: The message status update time, to the millisecond.
